datasets.name: Synthetic Section 6 substitute sources
datasets.substitute_strategy: Use deterministic binary random, extracted-paper English, and 100-character random sources.

metrics.name: references per character passed
metrics.reported_value: English length 5 approximately 0.24 in the paper

experiments.name: Section 6 synthetic analogue
experiments.purpose: Regenerate the paper's references-per-character-passed trend with substitute sources.
